textByHash.032b98867e896b648c6cf2a846b98c2b701ad9ae: You are welcome. There is a bed around here if you wish.
textByHash.4ec8f0917a258d219fad76a4fd3e46735e9f9117: Of course you did. Speak to one of my order here. They will be able to explain in a manner more suited to your understanding.
textByHash.5efd2d4491bf73d80c9d0f5ff02d5abafbcf4386: I can tell that your mind is not suited to the paradoxicalities of precognition.
textByHash.c9d23d71d9ae5e067c215d968eb4b2e0520df941: We are the Order of the Dagon'hai.
textByHash.d6db19906be58858c97787b5f4622f9f75973ecb: Through my magic, I can see a short way into the future.
textByHash.e580cf9dc6a623a2ccd11f49c48cc6c18f793789: These are the Tunnels of Chaos.
textByHash.ef44d1416f2b9c7f4e512281fcda329c4c9fd510: You are excused. And you are welcome.
